note: APPEND-ONLY. Prior evidence preserved byte-for-byte. Corrects the honest canary status at the start of the Real-Canary-Closure sprint and records the source fixes. No paid calls produced this amendment.

canaryStatus.reason: the paid smoke used an empty ValidationScope and blocked at the canonical gate before selection; job->revision->approval persistence was never exercised live

sourceFixes.A_operatorAuthorizationVsFounderConsent: CanaryIdentity.optedIn renamed to operatorAuthorized (allowlisting is an OPERATOR signal, not founder consent). Added isValidFounderWallet (0x+40hex, rejects anonymous/empty/malformed/prose); resolveCanaryAuthority now rejects invalid_wallet and not_operator_authorized. job.ts builds the identity ONLY from a valid SIWE-verified founderWallet. The actual founder decision remains the separate SIWE approval of the revision.
sourceFixes.B_approvalAuthority: bindCanaryApproval renamed canaryPlanCommitment; returns { commitment } not { token }; documented as provenance ONLY, never authorization. The authoritative approval path is unchanged: createRevision(selected plan) -> SIWE approve endpoint -> server recomputes hashes+budget -> approveRevision(current).
sourceFixes.C_selectedPlanProvenance: A grounded-selected plan now persists grounded provenance (architect+critic requested/served model, providers, contract versions, observationSetDigest, grounded plan digest, planSource=grounded_v2) on the job result; job columns model/provider + the revision use the grounded architect, not brain.model; the revision reason is generated_grounded_v2.
sourceFixes.D_evalConclusiveness: Calibration harness bug fixed: configurationConclusive is now `!stop` (a quota/auth/transport STOP is INCONCLUSIVE, never configuration-conclusive).

noSideEffects: Nothing deployed, funded, launched, settled, or globally enabled. Default MISSION_GROUNDING_MODE remains off.
